_comment: Thorax: lung_L, lung_R, heart, spinal_cord, esophagus (6 classes incl. background).
_memory_note: RTX 2080 Ti = 11 GB VRAM. Thorax volumes are large (full lung fields). Gradient checkpointing on shared encoder res_blocks saves ~1.5–2 GB; perceptual loss kept at base value of 1.
_note_class_weights: Median-frequency balancing. Approx voxel fractions: lung_L~18%, lung_R~18%, heart~8%, spinal_cord~1%, esophagus~0.3%. Run scripts/compute_class_weights.py to recompute from your training split.
